log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Owlin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Owlin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Owlin — Unarmored Caster.
→ Owlin — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 20] FAIL! 37 necrotic damage. HP: 30/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Owlin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Owlin — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:12+12=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 fire damage. Owlin — Unarmored Caster HP: 12/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Owlin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Owlin — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Owlin — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:4+12=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 fire damage. Owlin — Unarmored Caster HP: -4/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
